center.name: Phillip Parker King
center.summary: Phillip Parker King是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Imperial shag、Slender-billed parakeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The imperial shag or imperial cormorant (Leucocarbo atriceps) is a black-and-white cormorant native to southern South America, islands of the Subantarctic, and the Antarctic Peninsula, primarily in rocky coastal regions, but locally also at large inland lakes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Enicognathus leptorhynchus |volume=2022 |article-number=e.T22685891A208980485 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-1.RLTS.T22685891A208980485.en |access-date=15 March 2023}} | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | genus = Enicognathus | species = leptorhynchus | authority = (King, 1831) | range_map = Enicognathus leptorhynchus map.svg | range_map_caption = Approximate range in green | synonyms = Enicognathus byroni }} The slender-billed parakeet (Enicognathus leptorhynchus) or choroy, is a species of bird in subfamily Arinae of the family Psittacidae, the African and New World parrots
